footer.description: A contemporary art museum dedicated to creative expression and cultural innovation, showcasing diverse artistic voices from around the world.

exhibitions.title: Our Exhibitions
exhibitions.description: Discover our diverse collection of contemporary artworks from talented artists around the world. Each exhibition offers a unique perspective and invites you to explore new dimensions of creativity.
exhibitions.planVisitDesc: Experience these exhibitions in person at Marcy Museum. Open Tuesday through Sunday, 10:00 AM - 7:00 PM.
exhibitions.currentDesc: Explore our carefully selected exhibitions showcasing diverse artistic voices and perspectives.

visit.findUsDesc: Visit us at our location in Las Palmas de Gran Canaria

hero.title: Welcome to Marcy Museum
hero.subtitle: Where contemporary art meets innovation and creativity knows no bounds.
hero.description: Discover our curated collection of exhibitions featuring artists from around the world.

foro.title: Community Forum
foro.description: Share your thoughts about our exhibitions.
